meta_title: For Founders: testing automation to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Testing Automation: Build a Portfolio Without Experience
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about a thin portfolio. Use this intermediate guide to implement testing automation with Antigravity and Claude Code to prove your technical rigor.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, build trust through technical excellence. Implement automated testing suites that prove your code is production-ready. By using Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative validation, you transform raw features into a verified, high-quality SaaS asset that commands investor and customer respect.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is that clients don't care about your potential; they care about your reliability. A lack of a portfolio is not a failure of talent, but a failure of proof. When you ship features without automated tests, you are essentially asking your users to be your unpaid QA team, a risk no serious founder can afford to take.

But here is the edge: most developers skip testing. By mastering automated testing, you immediately distance yourself from the amateur hobbyists. You aren't just shipping code; you are shipping a system of integrity. Using Antigravity and Claude Code, we will turn your lack of history into a demonstration of engineering discipline.

steps.title: Define the Testing Scope
steps.description: Identify the critical paths in your SaaS that drive revenue—auth, checkout, and core logic. We prioritize these for high-impact coverage.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase structure and identify the top 3 mission-critical flows that require unit and integration tests to ensure user retention.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /review --focus 'identify critical business logic paths for testing'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Test Harness
steps.description: Set up a robust testing environment that integrates seamlessly with your existing CI/CD pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive Jest and Playwright configuration for a Next.js/Node.js stack, ensuring support for mocking external API calls.

steps.title: Implement Unit Test Suites
steps.description: Write tests for individual functions to ensure logic stability before scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create unit tests for the core utility functions. Focus on edge-case handling and input sanitization to ensure security.

steps.title: End-to-End (E2E) Automation
steps.description: Simulate real user behavior to guarantee the SaaS flow is frictionless from signup to payment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design an E2E test script using Playwright that simulates a user registering, adding an item to the cart, and completing a mock checkout.

steps.title: Automate the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Integrate your tests into a pre-commit hook so no untested code ever reaches production.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a husky pre-commit hook configuration that triggers the full test suite and blocks commits if coverage drops below 85%.

pro_tips: Treat your test folder as a marketing asset; document your coverage ratios in your GitHub README to show enterprise-level discipline.
Use mock data factories to ensure your tests are deterministic and never dependent on flaky external API states.
Prioritize 'happy path' tests first, but always include a 'negative path' test for every input field to showcase security awareness.
Run tests in parallel during CI/CD to keep your deployment speed high while maintaining rigorous quality gates.
When explaining your work to investors, focus on the 'MTTR' (Mean Time to Repair) improvements gained from your testing suite.
content.next_steps: Deploy your now-tested application to a staging environment and document the CI/CD pipeline logs as part of your technical case study.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to build software that lasts and the proof to show you're a serious founder. Stop letting a lack of history hold you back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
